name: Pre-ship browser testing plan
description: Create an execution-ready browser testing plan for the final pre-ship pass across mobile layout, protected navigation, core expense and household flows, data consistency, screenshots, and runtime evidence.

planned: Used `using-skills` first and classified the request as Level 2 because the user asked for a durable pre-ship testing plan with multiple flows, layout judgment, screenshots, expected outcomes, and execution lanes.
Used `playwright-cli`, `subagent-driven-development`, `writing-plans`, `grill-with-docs`, `ui-ux-review`, and `verification-before-completion` guidance without running the actual browser tests.

Read `docs/PLANS.md`, `docs/FRONTEND.md`, exact frontend shell/page refs, exact MVP product specs for auth/expenses/analytics/households/groups/budgets/profile, `docs/SECURITY.md`, the accepted mobile-first design doc, and current route/component evidence before drafting the plan.
artifacts: Added `docs/exec-plans/plans/2026-05-29-pre-ship-browser-testing-plan.md` with exact Playwright CLI command syntax, screenshot requirements, mobile/desktop layout criteria, main flow/data assertions, cleanup steps, and subagent execution lanes.
Updated `docs/exec-plans/index.md` to list the new testing plan under Active.
Updated `harness/feature_index.json`, added this feature record, and logged progress in `harness/progress.md`.
verification: JSON validation passed for `harness/feature_index.json` and `harness/features/feat-075.json` via Node JSON.parse.
`git diff --check` passed with no whitespace errors.
Credential leak scan found no persisted match for the provided password, provided email, or hardcoded E2E password assignment in the changed plan/harness files.
`gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all, repo: household-finance-system)` returned LOW risk with 4 changed symbols, 3 indexed changed files, 0 affected symbols, and 0 affected processes.

notes: This feature creates the plan only. It intentionally does not execute Playwright tests and does not store the provided test password in tracked files.
